title: stenoloma trifoliatum
intro: Stenoloma trifoliatum, also known as the trifoliated spleenwort, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Stenoloma trifoliatum typically involve drying and processing the leaves into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
